# עדן מזרחי אדריכלות ועיצוב פנים — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> An independent architect and interior designer with 4 years of experience who accompanies and manages design projects from start to finish. The business focuses on professional project guidance, combining architectural expertise with interior design sensibility. The freelance nature suggests a personal, boutique-style practice with hands-on client involvement.

---

## Pages

### בית
https://-aade86d2.zappy5.app
מחפשים אדריכל ומעצב פנים שילווה אתכם צעד אחר צעד? עדן מזרחי מציעה ליווי פרויקטים אישי, רגיש ומקצועי. קבעו פגישת ייעוץ ראשונית עוד היום.

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://-aade86d2.zappy5.app
- Endpoint: https://-aade86d2.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text)
  - `email` (email)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox)

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About עדן מזרחי אדריכלות ועיצוב פנים
An independent architect and interior designer with 4 years of experience who accompanies and manages design projects from start to finish. The business focuses on professional project guidance, combining architectural expertise with interior design sensibility. The freelance nature suggests a personal, boutique-style practice with hands-on client involvement.

## Target Audience
- בעלי בתים יוקרתיים
- רוכשי בתים חדשים
- בעלי נכסים מסחריים

## Industry
Architecture & Interior Design
